description_long: This is a three-seater sofa upholstered in a rich brown material, likely faux or genuine leather, with a smooth and slightly glossy finish. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be attached. Three light gray throw pillows are placed on the seat, providing a subtle color contrast and added comfort. The armrests are gently rounded and padded, extending slightly above the seat level and blending seamlessly into the sofa's overall form. The legs are short, block-style, and positioned at the corners, barely visible beneath the base. The backrest is continuous, moderately high, and slightly curved, offering full support along the length of the sofa.
description: A brown leather three-seater sofa with three seat and back cushions, rounded padded armrests, and three light gray throw pillows. The design is smooth, modern, and comfortable with subtle color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, three light gray throw pillows, and rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the padded armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth brown backrest and the sofa's solid back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the sofa's length, cushion thickness, and armrest design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all attached, with three loose light gray throw pillows placed on top.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, rounded and padded armrests that extend slightly above the seat, with a smooth, continuous profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or plastic, with a recessed appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Moderately high, continuous backrest with a gentle curve, no tufting or channeling, and attached back cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown upholstery with a smooth, slightly glossy leather-like texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
